title: Manage Stake #{{neuronId}}

increaseStake.title: Increase Stake
increaseStake.description: Add more ICP to this Stake to increase your voting power and rewards.
increaseStake.maxButtonAriaLabel: Set amount to maximum available balance
increaseStake.info: Adding ICP to your Stake increases your voting power and potential rewards. The added amount will be locked for the same dissolve delay period.
increaseStake.success: Successfully added {{amount}} ICP to your Stake.

errors.failed: Failed to increase Stake. Please try again.

increaseDelay.title: New dissolve delay
increaseDelay.description: Increasing the dissolve delay will increase your voting power and APY rewards.
increaseDelay.warning: The dissolve delay can only be increased, never decreased.
increaseDelay.alreadyMax: Your Stake is already at maximum dissolve delay.

errors.failed: Failed to increase dissolve delay. Please try again.

maturityMode.title: Maturity mode
maturityMode.description: Choose how to handle your staking rewards (maturity).
maturityMode.autoStakeDescription: Maturity is automatically staked to compound your rewards.

dissolve.startDescription: Starting to unlock will begin the countdown. After the dissolve delay period, you can withdraw your ICP.
dissolve.stopDescription: Stopping the unlock will pause the countdown and keep your Stake locked, maximizing your rewards.
dissolve.warning: While unlocking, your APY will decrease as the dissolve delay decreases.
dissolve.successStart: Unlocking started. Your Stake will be available after the dissolve delay.
dissolve.successStop: Unlocking stopped. Your Stake is now locked.

confirmNavigation: An action is in progress. Leaving this page may cause unexpected results. Are you sure you want to leave?
